input._notes: This is a product master data export from MerQuant (v4), not a traditional tech pack. The document primarily contains articles, pricing, and fabric consumption data. Fabric specifications were extracted from the SKU Fabric Consumption sheet (sheet 2). Accessories sheet (3) contains entries for GPFRIOMP products (mattress protectors) which are different product lines and were not included. The SKU Accessory Consumption data was minimal and generic for this product line. No zipper or label specifications were found in the source data for SLPCSS products. The file contains 22 active SKUs for the Sleep Cool Stretch Sheet Set line with consistent fabric composition (170 GSM Jersey Knit in four colors across eight size variants).

input._notes: File: merquant-master-data-PCSJMO-Modal-Jersey.xlsx. Extracted 42 articles (sheet sets, pillow case sets, and display items), 45 fabric consumption records (covering flat sheets, fitted sheets, pillow cases, and fabric bags across multiple bed sizes), extensive accessory consumption data (focusing on PCSJMO-T-WH color variant, with labels, trims, packaging, and hardware), carton master data for 40 SKUs, price list for 42 items, and 6 supplier records. Sheets "7. Seasons" and "8. Production Lines" were empty (header-only) and have been omitted per instructions. Accessory consumption data is comprehensive but only detailed for select color variants in the source; full variant matrix would require expansion. Notes in fabric consumption sheet indicate Full XL was scaled from Full data.
